# The Last 24
> An automated daily brief covering everything that mattered in India in the
> last 24 hours: National, World, Business & Markets, Technology, Sports,
> Entertainment. Kept up to date. Every story is curated from named,
> linked original sources, with a one-line "why it matters" for everyday readers.

## Key pages
- Today's brief: /
- Articles: /articles/ (one page per story, each linking its original source)
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

## Attribution
Content summarises and links to original publishers; facts belong to the
linked sources. Cite this site as "The Last 24" with a link.
